Based on my analysis, I found the issue. In the `drawLabel` method of `Axis.java`, there's a potential null pointer exception when `plotState.getOwner()` returns null. The code needs to be updated to handle this case properly.

Let me fix the code in the `drawLabel` method:
Great! Now I've added a null check for the owner object to prevent the potential NullPointerException. Let me now test the fix to see if it resolves the issue:

content.text: It seems the original file doesn't exist. Let me check if there's a way to get the original file using defects4j or try a different approach:

input.command: defects4j export -o source/org/jfree/chart/axis/Axis.java.orig source/org/jfree/chart/axis/Axis.java && diff -u source/org/jfree/chart/axis/Axis.java.orig source/org/jfree/chart/axis/Axis.java > blind_fix.patch
input.description: Creating the patch by first exporting the original file and then creating diff

content.content:
usage: defects4j export -p property_name [-o output_file] [-w work_dir]

Properties:
  classes.modified  Classes modified by the bug fix
  classes.relevant  Classes loaded by the triggering tests
  cp.compile        Classpath to compile the project
  cp.test           Classpath to compile and run the developer-written tests
  dir.bin.classes   Target directory of classes
  dir.bin.tests     Target directory of test classes
  dir.src.classes   Source directory of classes
  dir.src.tests     Source directory of tests
  tests.all         List of all developer-written tests
  tests.relevant    Relevant tests that touch at least one of the modified sources
  tests.trigger     Trigger tests that expose the bug
